prose: Pyridine frontier-orbital gap — DFT, tier `standard` (**B3LYP/def2-TZVP**, density-fit) in PySCF, gas phase, charge 0, multiplicity 1. Geometry: user-supplied `.xyz` file at `/home/erobles/chem-skills/benchmarks/fidelity/frontier-orbitals-validation/pyridine/pyridine.xyz`; the DFT calculation was a single point on this geometry, not re-optimized. SCF converged in 10 cycles. HOMO = −7.2525992 eV, LUMO = −1.112786 eV → gap ≈ 6.1398131 eV (Koopmans-style orbital gap, not an excitation energy). The live `.out` log for this run would be found in the current working directory, named `frontier_orbitals_YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS.out`. No warnings reported.
